title: Basic Operations on a Linear Data Structure
description: A flowchart illustrating the core processes of inserting a new element, deleting an existing element, and displaying all elements within a simple linear data structure like an array or linked list.
relationships: Start leads to a choice of three operations
Insert Process adds an element to the Data Structure
Delete Process removes an element from the Data Structure
Display Process reads and outputs all elements from the Data Structure
Each operation completes and leads back to the Start/End point
